stageEditor.title: Messages per stage
stageEditor.subtitle: Define per lead stage which messages (WhatsApp/email) go out and at what intervals.
stageEditor.safetyNote: As long as automatic sending is not switched on, nothing is sent. “Active” means: goes out once the system is live.

stageEditor.subjectPh: e.g. Your appointment with Happy Property
stageEditor.bodyPh: Plain text – used when no HTML is set.
stageEditor.htmlHint: HTML overrides the plain text when sending.
stageEditor.activeOn: Active – goes out once sending is live
stageEditor.errEmail: Email subject and text are required

adhoc.safetyNote: These messages are only stored. As long as sending is not armed, nothing is sent.
adhoc.label: Label / Purpose
adhoc.bodyPh: Plain text – used when no HTML is provided.
adhoc.htmlHint: HTML overrides the plain text when sending.
adhoc.stScheduled: ⏳ Scheduled (goes out once sending is live)
adhoc.errEmail: Email subject and text (or HTML) are required

deck.title: Sales deck assets (Google Drive)
deck.help: Drive folder ID of the project. The import automatically pulls renders, floor plans (per floor), brochure, furnishing/cutlery/linen and generates apartment-safe facts.
deck.saveFirst: Save the project first, then load assets.
deck.enterManually: Please enter the folder ID manually.
deck.needAssets: Load assets from Drive first (facts missing).
deck.factsBackground: Facts running in the background (~1 min)
deck.factsPending: Facts not ready yet (running in the background) — please wait a minute and retry.
deck.deckTimeout: The deck is taking unusually long — please check again with “Open deck” shortly.
deck.unitsBackground: Apartments are being created in the background (~½ min)

portal.title: 🔑 Send Portal Access
portal.intro: Create an owner account and send the credentials by email. The password is generated automatically and appended as a formatted block.
portal.subjectPlaceholder: Your access to the Happy Property portal
portal.credentialsAppended: The credentials are appended automatically as a formatted block.
portal.sentSuccess: ✅ The credentials were sent successfully by email!

owner.nowVisible: {{name}} is now visible in the user list as an owner.
owner.passwordWarning: ⚠️ Copy the password now — it won't be shown again.

unitEdit.alreadyHasAccess: already has portal access — no need to resend.
unitEdit.willCreateOwner: An owner account will be created automatically after saving.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.googleReadOnly: Google events can only be edited in Google.

appointment.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Initial Zoom Call, Property Tour…

ai.safety: The AI only creates drafts. Nothing is sent automatically. You review, correct and approve – then copy the text and send it as usual. The system learns from your approvals and corrections.
ai.inboundPh: What did the customer write? Paste here or adopt above…
ai.unavailableBody: The AI draft generator is set up but not yet live. Once you give the go-ahead it gets activated – then this button works. Until then everything stays a pure draft workflow.
ai.savedApproved: Approved & copied – the system learns from it
ai.savedEdited: Approved (corrected) & copied – the system learns from it
ai.historyTitle: Previous AI replies for this lead
ai.historyEmpty: No AI drafts for this lead yet.

aiAgent.title: AI Reply Agent
aiAgent.subtitle: Drafts for incoming customer messages – you review and approve. The system learns from your approvals and corrections.
aiAgent.step1: In the lead under “🤖 AI Reply”, adopt the incoming customer message and generate a draft.
aiAgent.step2: Review the draft, correct it if needed.
aiAgent.step3: Approve & copy – you send the text yourself as usual (WhatsApp/email).
aiAgent.step4: The system remembers your approved/corrected replies and improves over time.
aiAgent.autopilotOnDesc: The “fully automatic” preference is saved. Automatic sending is NOT live yet, though – nothing is sent without your approval.
aiAgent.autopilotOffDesc: Off: The AI only creates drafts. You approve every reply yourself.
aiAgent.confirmOn: Save full automation as a preference? Note: This does NOT send anything automatically. Automatic sending only becomes active after explicit activation in the backend – until then everything stays in draft mode.
aiAgent.safety: Safety: This switch only stores your preference. Even when on, the system currently sends NOTHING automatically – automatic sending only becomes active after explicit activation in the backend. This way nothing can go out to real customers by accident.

docs.title: Workflow Documents
docs.subtitle: These documents are automatically attached to emails
docs.infoTitle: How does the automatic attachment feature work?
docs.infoText: When you send an email with the matching category, the latest active document for that category is automatically attached. Make sure exactly one document per category is active.
docs.empty: No documents yet. Drag a PDF into the upload zone.
